title: Pretty Fluffy Indian Eggplant Baingan Bharta
description: A romantic and nutty Indian dish featuring blackcurrant jam, this vegan-friendly baingan bharta is a unique twist on the classic recipe. It has a fluffy texture and a sweet and savory flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roast the eggplant for 30 minutes, or until the skin is charred and the flesh is tender.
Let the eggplant cool, then peel and chop it into small pieces.
Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is lightly browned and caramelized.
Add the garlic and ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the smoked paprika, salt, and blackcurrant jam.
Add the tomato puree to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
Fold in the roasted eggplant and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
